app.title: Hotspot
app.tagline: Discover the perfect destination for your next date nearby
app.hint: No account needed · Free · Start instantly

onboarding.step1Subtitle: Choose the places you want to see on the map
onboarding.title: Where are you?
onboarding.subtitle: Share your location or choose a spot on the map
onboarding.clickHint: Click on the map to set your location

map.loadingSub: Searching for the best spots near you
map.expandT3: More distant hotspots are on the way...
map.t2: Checking if the coffee is any good...
map.t4: Hunting down the best pizza nearby...
map.t6: The perfect date spot is almost found!
map.t8: Hang on — great spots take time!
map.errorSub: Could not load places. Check your connection and try again.
map.errorTimeoutTitle: The server is taking its time 🐢
map.errorTimeoutSub: The map server is a bit busy. We already tried a few times — give it a moment and try again!
map.errorRateLimitSub: Too many requests went out at once. Wait a minute and then try again.
map.filterHiddenBody: {{count}} places loaded but hidden by your filters.
map.debugIfFails: If it fails or you retry:
map.debugFallbackOwn: Falls back to the Overpass API. Retry = same path (DB first, else Overpass).
map.debugFallbackOverpass: On 429/timeout: auto-retry with longer wait. No other source; manual retry = same Overpass request.
map.debugFallbackCache: Cache bypassed — next round uses our database (NL) or Overpass direct.
map.debugFallbackPendingNL: Local cache first; in the Netherlands then our database, otherwise Overpass API.
map.debugFallbackPendingAbroad: Local cache first; outside the NL area, Overpass API directly.
map.debugFallbackPendingUnknown: Local cache first; then our database (in NL) or Overpass (outside), depending on location.

panel.title3: ✨ You don't want to miss these
